problems.question: I'm tired. I got up (　　) 5:00 this morning.
problems.ja: 疲れているよ。今朝は５時に起きたんだ。
problems.en: I'm tired. I got up at 5:00 this morning.

problems.question: We are expecting our grandparents to arrive (　　) November 28th.
problems.ja: 11月28日に私たちの祖父母がやってくることになっている。
problems.en: We are expecting our grandparents to arrive on November 28th.

problems.question: My sister was born (　　).
problems.ja: 私の姉［妹］は1949年の４月に生まれた。
problems.en: My sister was born in April 1949.

problems.question:
私たちは朝７時に朝食をとる。
We (breakfast / have / in / at / seven / the) morning.
problems.rawAnswer: have breakfast at seven in the
problems.ja: 私たちは朝７時に朝食をとる。
problems.answer: have breakfast at seven in the
problems.en: We have breakfast at seven in the morning.

problems.question: We went to a disco (　　).
problems.ja: 私たちは金曜日の夜にディスコに行った。
problems.en: We went to a disco on Friday night.

problems.question: His house is almost (　　) the top of the hill.
problems.ja: 彼の家はほぼ丘のてっぺんに建っている。
problems.en: His house is almost at the top of the hill.

problems.question: He made up his mind to fish (　　) the sea next week.
problems.ja: 彼は来週，海で釣りをすることに決めた。
problems.en: He made up his mind to fish in the sea next week.

problems.question: A fly is (　　) the ceiling and she is trying to hit it.
problems.ja: 一匹のハエが天井にとまっていて，彼女はそれを叩こうとしている。
problems.en: A fly is on the ceiling and she is trying to hit it.

problems.question: He's still painting the picture but will finish it (　　) a week or two.
problems.ja: 彼はまだ絵の制作中だが，あと１，２週間で終えるだろう。
problems.en: He's still painting the picture but will finish it in a week or two.

problems.question: The construction of the building will be completed (　　) two months.
problems.ja: そのビルの建築工事は２か月以内に終わるだろう。
problems.en: The construction of the building will be completed within two months.

problems.question: Please wait here (　　) five minutes.
problems.ja: ５分間ここでお待ちください。
problems.en: Please wait here for five minutes.

problems.question:
(a) I met him twice while I was staying in Paris.
(b) I met him twice (　　) (　　) stay in Paris.
problems.ja:
(a) パリにいる間，私は彼に２度会った。
(b) パリ滞在中，私は彼に２度会った。
problems.en: I met him twice during my stay in Paris.

problems.question: I will continue analyzing this data (　　) the end of this academic year.
problems.ja: この学年の終わりまで，このデータの分析を続けるつもりだ。
problems.en: I will continue analyzing this data till the end of this academic year.

problems.question: Please complete the assignment (　　) next Monday.
problems.ja: 次の月曜までに課題を終えてください。
problems.en: Please complete the assignment by next Monday.

problems.question: There was a full moon (　　) the mountain.
problems.ja: 山の上に満月が出ていた。
problems.en: There was a full moon above the mountain.

problems.question: This cafe is popular (　　) local residents as well as visitors.
problems.ja: このカフェは観光客だけでなく地元住民の間でも人気がある。
problems.en: This cafe is popular among local residents as well as visitors.

problems.question: There is no connection (　　) the two incidents.
problems.ja: ２つの事件には何の関連性もない。
problems.en: There is no connection between the two incidents.

problems.question: Are you (　　) or against the proposal?
problems.ja: あなたはその提案に賛成ですか，それとも反対ですか。
problems.en: Are you for or against the proposal?

problems.question: It's (　　) the law to smoke cigarettes before you are twenty.
problems.ja: 二十歳になる前の喫煙は違法だ。
problems.en: It's against the law to smoke cigarettes before you are twenty.

problems.question:
(a) He sings as if he were a rock star.
(b) He sings (　　) a rock star.
problems.ja:
(a) 彼はまるでロックスターであるかのように歌う。
(b) 彼はロックスターのように歌う。
problems.en: He sings like a rock star.

problems.question: (　　) sharks, whales and dolphins are warm-blooded mammals.
problems.ja: サメとは違い，クジラやイルカは温血の哺乳類である。
problems.en: Unlike sharks, whales and dolphins are warm-blooded mammals.

problems.question:
彼らはその新しい小説を，いきいきとした場面に満ちた子ども向けの本として計画した。
They designed the new novel (a children's / with / book / packed / as) colorful scenes.
problems.rawAnswer: as a children's book packed with
problems.ja: 彼らはその新しい小説を，いきいきとした場面に満ちた子ども向けの本として計画した。
problems.answer: as a children's book packed with
problems.en: They designed the new novel as a children's book packed with colorful scenes.

problems.question: Mary is taller than Judy (　　) two inches.
problems.ja: メアリーはジュディーよりも２インチ背が高い。
problems.en: Mary is taller than Judy by two inches.

problems.question: The knife to cut the bread (　　) was very blunt.
problems.ja: パンを切るのに使うナイフはとても切れ味が悪かった。
problems.en: The knife to cut the bread with was very blunt.

problems.question: You can contact me (　　) e-mail.
problems.ja: 私とはメールで連絡がとれます。
problems.en: You can contact me by e-mail.

problems.question: Please refrain from talking (　　) the phone near the priority seats in the train.
problems.ja: 電車内の優先席付近での携帯電話での通話はお控えください。
problems.en: Please refrain from talking on the phone near the priority seats in the train.

problems.question: It is not polite to talk (　　) your mouth full.
problems.ja: 口に食べ物をほおばったまま話をするのは失礼だ。
problems.en: It is not polite to talk with your mouth full.

problems.question:
コートを着たまま台所に入ってはいけません。
You should not (the kitchen / with / on / your / enter / overcoat).
problems.rawAnswer: enter the kitchen with your overcoat on
problems.ja: コートを着たまま台所に入ってはいけません。
problems.answer: enter the kitchen with your overcoat on
problems.en: You should not enter the kitchen with your overcoat on.

problems.question:
その少年は，彼女の首に腕を回したまま眠ってしまった。
(the boy / arms / her / asleep / with / neck / around / fell / his).
problems.rawAnswer: The boy fell asleep with his arms around her neck
problems.ja: その少年は，彼女の首に腕を回したまま眠ってしまった。
problems.answer: The boy fell asleep with his arms around her neck
problems.en: The boy fell asleep with his arms around her neck.

problems.question: The pianist (　　) long hair is my girlfriend.
problems.ja: その長い髪のピアニストは僕のガールフレンドだ。
problems.en: The pianist with long hair is my girlfriend.

problems.question:
あの赤い服の女性があなたのことを知りたがっていたよ。
The (was / woman / in / curious / red) to know about you.
problems.ja: あの赤い服の女性があなたのことを知りたがっていたよ。
problems.en: The woman in red was curious to know about you.

problems.question: They discussed the matter (　　) tea and cakes.
problems.ja: 彼らはお茶を飲みケーキを食べながら，その問題について話し合った。
problems.en: They discussed the matter over tea and cakes.

problems.question: (　　) literature, we have to study Japanese and world history.
problems.ja: 文学に加えて，私たちは日本語と世界史の勉強をしなければならない。
problems.en: Besides literature, we have to study Japanese and world history.

problems.question: I will eat anything (　　) natto.
problems.ja: 納豆以外は何でも食べます。
problems.en: I will eat anything but natto.

problems.question: All of the audience was impressed by his lecture (　　) the early history of Japan.
problems.ja: 聴衆はみな，日本の初期の歴史についての彼の講義に感銘を受けた。
problems.en: All of the audience was impressed by his lecture on the early history of Japan.

problems.question: (　　) his efforts, he was not able to pass the examination for a driver's license.
problems.ja: 努力したにもかかわらず，彼は運転免許の取得試験に合格できなかった。
problems.en: Despite his efforts, he was not able to pass the examination for a driver's license.

problems.question: Mike is very active (　　) his age.
problems.ja: マイクは年齢のわりにはとても活動的だ。
problems.en: Mike is very active for his age.

problems.question: Is that project worth (　　) at a great expense to the taxpayer?
problems.ja: そのプロジェクトは，納税者に多大な負担をかけてまで立ち上げる価値があるのか。
problems.en: Is that project worth launching at a great expense to the taxpayer?

problems.question:
その企画の見積もり額は考慮に値する。
It is worth (　　) the estimated cost of the project.
problems.ja: その企画の見積もり額は考慮に値する。
problems.en: It is worth considering the estimated cost of the project.

problems.question: Most of the questions are easy, but this particular one is (　　) me.
problems.ja: ほとんどの問題は簡単だが，特にこの問題は難しくて私には理解できない［私の能力を超えている］。
problems.en: Most of the questions are easy, but this particular one is beyond me.

problems.question: My stolen bicycle was destroyed (　　) recognition.
problems.ja: 私の盗まれた自転車は，見分けがつかないほどに壊されていた。
problems.en: My stolen bicycle was destroyed beyond recognition.

problems.question: I went fishing (　　) the river.
problems.ja: 私は川に釣りに行った。
problems.en: I went fishing in the river.

problems.question: They were close to home now, but David turned (　　) the opposite direction.
problems.ja: 彼らはもう家の近くまで来ていたが，デイビッドは反対方向に曲がった。
problems.en: They were close to home now, but David turned in the opposite direction.

problems.question: I went skiing for the first time (　　) fifteen years.
problems.ja: 私は15年ぶりにスキーに行った。
problems.en: I went skiing for the first time in fifteen years.

problems.question: (　　) my surprise, she didn't come to their wedding party.
problems.ja: 驚いたことに，彼女は彼らの結婚パーティーに来なかった。
problems.en: To my surprise, she didn't come to their wedding party.

problems.question: We danced (　　) the music.
problems.ja: 私たちは音楽に合わせて踊った。
problems.en: We danced to the music.

problems.question: The president said that it was (　　) great importance to develop the US-China constructive partnership.
problems.ja: 米中の建設的な協調関係を進展させることが非常に重要であると，大統領は述べた。
problems.en: The president said that it was of great importance to develop the US-China constructive partnership.

problems.question: The dog jumped over the fence (　　) ease.
problems.ja: その犬は簡単に柵を飛び越えた。
problems.en: The dog jumped over the fence with ease.

problems.question: I get paid (　　) the hour.
problems.ja: 私は時間給で支払われる。
problems.en: I get paid by the hour.

problems.question: The mother caught her baby (　　) when he fell forward.
problems.ja: 赤ちゃんが前に倒れこんだとき，母親はその子の腕をつかんだ。
problems.en: The mother caught her baby by the arm when he fell forward.

problems.question:
コーチは私の肩をポンと叩きながら，励ましてくれた。（１語不要）
The coach encouraged me, (shoulder / patting / on / the / my / me).
problems.rawAnswer: patting me on the shoulder（my不要）
problems.ja: コーチは私の肩をポンと叩きながら，励ましてくれた。（１語不要）
problems.en: The coach encouraged me, patting me on the shoulder.

problems.question:
必ず彼の目を見て話しなさい。さもないと，正直に話していないと思われてしまう。
Be sure to (him / in / look / talking / the eye / while), or he might think you are not being honest.
problems.rawAnswer: look him in the eye while talking
problems.ja: 必ず彼の目を見て話しなさい。さもないと，正直に話していないと思われてしまう。
problems.answer: look him in the eye while talking
problems.en: Be sure to look him in the eye while talking, or he might think you are not being honest.
